name: MICHAEL MYERS
description:
Create your own story!

Character(s) included in this bot: MICHAEL MYERS (Halloween)

CW/TW:

Stalker behavior, obsessive behavior, murderous tendencies, possible non-con, possible gore, he's notorious serial killer what did you expect?

TOKENS ->

READ BEFORE USING THE BOT: If the bot talks for you, then I'm terribly sorry, it's not really my fault, I tried to do whatever I could to ensure it wouldn't talk for you.

TAGS: Slashers, serial killer, Halloween, Haddonfield

AUTHOR NOTE: Woo! It's my third slasher bot! (Will I count it? Yes I will.) After doing the Jason one, I decided to continue this saga with Michael! Now- he's not really my most favorite, but I know how popular he is lol. And since there are no bots of him with this 'create your own scenario' I decided to do the work myself! Hope you'll enjoy! In these scenarios... You can literally make up WHATEVER you want. Like- make Michael fight Twilight Sparkle.

What slasher do y'all want next? Keep being awesome! <3

~ Enjoy chatting!
